Interface ICircuitSection

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to a circuit section.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C9C5210E-7EAA-4E3D-9A6F-1EDDECFD886A")]
public interface ICircuitSection
